render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation.
performance_lock: PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional adaptation. The Narrator frequently addresses an implied listener/camera when in the bare room, calm-to-fevered direct address; flashback scenes are objective third-person staging where characters look at each other and scene action, not the viewer. Officers remain polite, observational, and scene-partner focused.

Character_Narrator.description: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.
Character_Narrator.visual_lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye.
Character_Narrator.performance_notes: In bare-room frames, speaks to camera/implied listener with careful composure that frays; in bedchamber action, plays opposite the Old Man and officers without breaking confessional V.O. continuity.

Character_OldMan.description: Frail elderly man, thin stooped build, sparse white hair, deeply lined pale face; one pale blue eye with a dull filmy veil, the other eye ordinary; wears a plain white period nightshirt.
Character_OldMan.voice_profile: Elderly male; thin, reedy, low energy; short startled phrases; weak breath support; same fragile voice in the single spoken line and any murmur.
Character_OldMan.visual_lock: Always elderly, white-haired, frail; signature constant is the single pale blue eye with dull filmy veil that must not drift to clear blue or to the Narrator's face; nightshirt is his default on-screen garment.
Character_OldMan.performance_notes: Looks toward door, darkness, or Narrator—not the audience; terror is inward and listening, not presentational.

Character_OfficerReynolds.description: Man in early 40s, solid medium build, square jaw, short neat brown hair with a straight side part, clean-shaven, steady brown eyes, lightly weathered skin.
Character_OfficerReynolds.voice_profile: Male, early 40s; medium-low pitch; even civil pace; polite official energy without menace; same measured voice throughout the search.
Character_OfficerReynolds.visual_lock: Only officer with square jaw and clean-shaven brown-haired look in early 40s; face must stay distinct from Hale's mustache and Briggs's younger smoother face; shared uniform via wardrobe_lock only.
Character_OfficerReynolds.performance_notes: Addresses Narrator and fellow officers; professional courtesy, not camera address.

Character_OfficerHale.description: Man in late 30s, lean tall build, long narrow face, dark hair combed back from a high forehead, thin dark mustache, gray-blue eyes, pale indoor complexion.
Character_OfficerHale.voice_profile: Male, late 30s; medium pitch; spare, quiet delivery; low energy, observational; little speech, same restrained tone if he speaks.
Character_OfficerHale.visual_lock: The only officer with a thin dark mustache and long narrow face; must not match Reynolds's clean-shaven square jaw or Briggs's fair younger look; uniform only via wardrobe_lock.
Character_OfficerHale.performance_notes: Exchanges mild glances with Briggs; watches Narrator without direct-to-camera play.

Character_OfficerBriggs.description: Man in late 20s to about 30, shorter stocky build, rounder face, sandy-blond hair cut short, clean-shaven, freckled fair skin, light hazel eyes; younger and smoother-faced than the other two officers.
Character_OfficerBriggs.voice_profile: Male, ~30; medium pitch slightly lighter than Reynolds; pleasant civil pace; easy unhurried energy while chatting.
Character_OfficerBriggs.visual_lock: Youngest officer: sandy-blond, freckled, stocky, clean-shaven—never brown-haired like Reynolds or mustached like Hale; shared coat/hat/badge only through wardrobe_lock.
Character_OfficerBriggs.performance_notes: Chats pleasantly with the others; polite smiles toward Narrator; no audience address.

Wardrobe_PoliceOfficers.description: Mid-19th-century civil police: long dark wool frock coat with wide notched lapels, matching dark trousers, white shirt and dark cravat, rounded black peaked civil police cap (not a military shako), brass oval breast badge, dark leather belt; carry a dark metal hand lantern.
Wardrobe_PoliceOfficers.visual_lock: Identical coat silhouette, rounded peaked cap, and brass oval badge on all three officers every time they appear; only faces and builds differ.
